nasb.text: The word of God kept on spreading; and the number of the disciples continued to increase greatly in Jerusalem, and a great many of the priests were becoming obedient to the faith.

esv.text: And the word of God continued to increase, and the number of the disciples multiplied greatly in Jerusalem, and a great many of the priests became obedient to the faith.

cnv.text: 神的道傳開了；在耶路撒冷，門徒人數大大增加，有很多祭司也信從了真道。

ccb.text: 上帝的道兴旺起来，耶路撒冷的门徒大大增多，连许多祭司也皈信了。

csbs.text: 这样，神的话语不断扩展，在耶路撒冷门徒的人数大大增多，并且有一大群祭司也听从了这信仰。
